column1: # Native shell ownership inventory for OPT-186.
# - pattern: exact module path under src/app_core/native_shell/composition, or a directory prefix ending in /**
# - owner: radiant_generic, compat_adapter, wavecrate_composition, or wavecrate_fixture
# - move_scope: stay_radiant, compat_boundary, or the Linear child issue that owns the move
# - notes: dependency and relocation notes without tabs
# regression requires every *.rs module under this directory to match exactly one pattern.

column4: notes
